headline: Jim Cramer on BXP, Inc.: “I Just Don’t Want It”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed BXP, Inc. (NYSE:BXP) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. A caller asked if office REITs like BXP are “waiting on the Fed to lower interest rates or if there are structural issues with the sector.” Cramer replied: I think there might be structural […]
